Interface Network

All Known Implementing Classes:
RMINetwork, TCPNetwork
public interface Network
Represents a network interface for sending and receiving messages. This interface defines methods for sending messages, reading messages, and managing the network state.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final long
    TIMEOUT

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    long
    getTimeout()
    Gets the timeout duration for the network.
    boolean
    isDone()
    Checks if the network connection is done.

    Reads a message from the network.

    Sends a message over the network.
    void
    setDone()
    Closes the network connection.

    setTimeout(long timeout)
     

  • Field Details

    • TIMEOUT

      static final long TIMEOUT
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • send

      boolean send(Message message)
      Sends a message over the network.
      Parameters:
      message - The message to be sent.
      Returns:
      true if the message was successfully sent, false otherwise.

    • read

      Message read()
      Reads a message from the network.
      Returns:
      The message read from the network.

    • setDone

      void setDone()
      Closes the network connection. This method should be called to clean up resources when the network is no longer needed.

    • isDone

      boolean isDone()
      Checks if the network connection is done.
      Returns:
      true if the connection is done, false otherwise.

    • getTimeout

      long getTimeout()
      Gets the timeout duration for the network.
      Returns:
      The timeout duration in milliseconds.

    • setTimeout

      void setTimeout(long timeout)
